Package model

Class Player.Builder

java.lang.Object
model.Player.Builder
Enclosing class:
Player
public static class Player.Builder extends Object
Builder class for creating instances of Player.

      public Builder(String playerName, String avatarImageName)

      playerName - the name of the player
      avatarImageName - the name of the avatar image
